recommendations.title: Waiting for "Superman"
recommendations.overview: Gripping, heartbreaking, and ultimately hopeful, Waiting for Superman is an impassioned indictment of the American school system from An Inconvenient Truth director Davis Guggenheim.

recommendations.title: An Inconvenient Truth
recommendations.overview: A documentary on Al Gore's campaign to make the issue of global warming a recognized problem worldwide.

recommendations.title: STILL: A Michael J. Fox Movie
recommendations.overview: A short kid from a Canadian army base becomes the international pop culture darling of the 1980s—only to find the course of his life altered by a stunning diagnosis. What happens when an incurable optimist confronts an incurable disease?

recommendations.title: He Named Me Malala
recommendations.overview: A look at the events leading up to the Taliban's attack on the young Pakistani school girl, Malala Yousafzai, for speaking out on girls' education and the aftermath, including her speech to the United Nations.

recommendations.title: Searching for Sugar Man
recommendations.overview: Two South Africans set out to discover what happened to their unlikely musical hero, the mysterious 1970s rock 'n' roller, Rodriguez.

recommendations.title: Gossip
recommendations.overview: For a class project, three college students decide to invent an unfounded rumor about the most popular girl on campus. But as the rumor spreads, it begins to spiral out of control.

recommendations.title: BTS World Tour: Love Yourself - Japan Edition
recommendations.overview: BTS perform their Japan concert at Tokyo Dome and Fukuoka Yahuoku Dome during their Love Yourself World Tour.

recommendations.title: Secrets of the Saqqara Tomb
recommendations.overview: This documentary follows a team of local archaeologists excavating never before explored passageways, shafts, and tombs, piecing together the secrets of Egypt’s most significant find in almost 50 years in Saqqara.

recommendations.title: ariana grande: excuse me, i love you
recommendations.overview: Ariana Grande takes the stage in London for her Sweetener World Tour and shares a behind-the-scenes look at her life in rehearsal and on the road.

recommendations.title: The Greatest Night in Pop
recommendations.overview: On a January night in 1985, music's biggest stars gathered to record "We Are the World." This documentary goes behind the scenes of the historic event.
